hero.name: Yahya Zakaria
hero.title: React Native & Front-End Developer
hero.subtitle: 8+ years · 30+ shipped apps · App Store & Google Play

about.bio: React Native and Front-End developer with 8+ years of experience building high-performance mobile and web applications. I focus on cross-platform delivery with React Native and Expo, modern state management (Zustand, Redux Toolkit), and server-state caching with TanStack Query. I’ve shipped 30+ production apps at Alyomhost and now work at Inspire Studio — both are Saudi-based product companies. My Diploma in Information Security shapes how I think about secure, maintainable code.

bullets: Lead development of cross-platform apps with React Native CLI and Expo for strong performance on Android and iOS.
Ship real-time features with WebSockets and Firebase to improve engagement and data sync.
Integrate Google Maps SDK and Mapbox for location-based experiences across client products.
Led delivery of 30+ mobile apps; improved performance through optimized React Native code and native integrations.
Cut load and improved UX with code-splitting, lazy loading, and TanStack Query for server state.
Scaled state with Zustand and Redux Toolkit; used Expo to speed up release cycles.
Migrated legacy native codebases to React Native while keeping a 4.5+ App Store rating.
Integrated payments, mapping, and real-time data APIs end to end.
Built and maintained 15+ production websites with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.
Delivered responsive layouts and cut load times through performance-focused front-end work.
Created reusable component patterns and helped migrate legacy front ends to React.
